title: Microsoft fixes bug that removed Copilot buttons in Outlook
summary: Microsoft has fixed a known issue causing the Copilot Chat or Copilot buttons in Classic Outlook to disappear for Windows users with the Copilot Chat (Basic) license. [...]

title: Cisco finally confirms attackers exploiting Unified CM flaw
summary: Cisco confirmed that attackers are now exploiting a Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) vulnerability patched in early June. [...]

title: CISA: Microsoft SharePoint RCE flaw now actively exploited
summary: CISA warned on Wednesday that attackers have begun exploiting a high-severity Microsoft SharePoint remote code execution vulnerability patched in May. [...]

title: Opera rolls out Paste Protect feature to fight ClickFix attacks
summary: Opera has introduced Paste Protect, a security feature designed to block ClickFix-style attacks that trick users into executing malicious commands through social engineering. [...]

title: Alleged Scattered Spider hacker extradited to the United States
summary: A dual United States and Estonian citizen has been extradited to the U.S. to face charges alleging he was a member of the Scattered Spider hacking collective. [...]

title: Medtronic notifies customers impacted by ShinyHunters data breach
summary: Healthcare device firm Medtronic is notifying affected customers about a data breach that exposed their personal data to an unauthorized third party. [...]

title: FortiBleed credential-theft campaign linked to Lynx ransomware
summary: The massive FortiBleed credential theft campaign has been linked to the INC and Lynx ransomware operations, suggesting the stolen Fortinet credentials were intended to fuel future network intrusions. [...]

title: Kubota says hackers had month-long access to network systems
summary: Kubota North America Corporation disclosed that hackers had access to some of its network systems for more than a month earlier this year. [...]

title: New ChocoPoC malware targets researchers via trojanized PoC exploits
summary: Multiple weaponized proof-of-concept (PoC) exploits on GitHub were found delivering a Python-based remote access trojan (RAT) named ChocoPoC that can execute commands and steal sensitive data in a campaign believed to target cybersecurity researchers. [...]

title: DHS confirms hackers breached HSIN info-sharing platform
summary: The Department of Homeland Security is investigating a cyberattack that compromised the Homeland Security Information Network (HSIN), a sensitive information-sharing platform used by federal, state, local, and private-sector partners. [...]

title: Webinar: Why traditional email security is no longer enough
summary: Modern phishing, business email compromise, and account takeover attacks increasingly exploit trusted identities and legitimate business workflows, making them harder for traditional email defenses to detect. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help organizations automate detection and response. [...]

title: Hackers target Microsoft 365 accounts with 81 million login attempts
summary: An aggressive password-spraying campaign targeting Microsoft 365 environments generated more than 81 million login attempts over a two-week period. [...]

title: Turning Indicators into Intelligence in OpenCTI with Criminal IP
summary: Threat intelligence is only as useful as the context behind it. Criminal IP explains how its integration enriches threat indicators in OpenCTI with risk scoring, infrastructure intelligence, and phishing analysis. [...]

title: Over 900 Oracle E-Business instances exposed to ongoing attacks
summary: Over 900 Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) instances have been found exposed online amid ongoing attacks exploiting a critical security flaw. [...]

title: Microsoft fixes GIF functionality in the Windows Emoji Panel
summary: Microsoft has fixed the GIF functionality in the Emoji Panel for Windows 11 users after the provider shut down its service. [...]
